title: More Enchantment Level Display-Chinese numerals
description:
Use Uppercase/Lowercase Chinese numerals 
 (and versions without units)  to show more envhantment levels.
body:
Supports Display:

1. [Roman numerals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/meld-roman-numerals);
2. [Arabic numerals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/meld-arabic-numerals);
3. [English words _(and versions without units)_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/meld-english-word-and-not-unit/) ~~(who needs it?)~~;
4. Uppercase/Lowercase Chinese numerals _(and versions without units)_ (This Project);
5. And their binary versions.
   
Precautions:
- It does **not support enchantment levels above 255**, as Minecraft itself does not support such high levels.
- This feature is compatible with Minecraft versions 1.12.2 and above.
- This is just a _resource pack_ and does **not include methods to obtain enchantment levels above 5**.


中文版简介：

此功能允许在Minecraft中显示超过5级（V）的魔咒等级。

支持显示：
1. [罗马数字](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/meld-roman-numerals)；
2. [阿拉伯数字](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/meld-arabic-numerals)；
3. [英语单词 _（和没有单位的版本）_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/meld-english-word-and-not-unit/) ~~(什么玩意这是)~~；
4. 大写/小写中文数字 _（和没有单位的版本）_ （本项目）；
5. 以及它们的二进制版本。

注意事项：

- 它**不支持超过255级的魔咒等级**，因为Minecraft本身不支持这样的高等级。
- 此功能兼容1.12.2及更高版本的Minecraft。
- 这只是个 _资源包_ ，**并没有添加获取5级以上魔咒等级的方式**。
